_comment: Per-desk model routing (research.25 / plan 2026-07-20-headless-newsroom-pipeline, Task 3). cron-desk-writer.js reads this keyed by --desk when --provider/--model are not given on the CLI. Voice-critical desks -> Sonnet; routine desks -> DeepSeek (per Feedback1.txt). The exact split is an open question (confirm with Mike).
